name: Tomasa Del Real
description: '''Valeria Cisternas''' (born 1 December 1986), better known by her stage name '''Tomasa Del Real''', is a Chilean singer, songwriter, and [[reggaeton|reggaetón]] artist. She is regarded as a pioneer of [[neoperreo]], a social-media-inspired offshoot of reggaetón, and is referred to as "La Reina del Neoperreo", Spanish for "the Queen of Neoperreo".
